name: Crumpin-Fox Club : 18 Hole Golf Course Bernardston, MA
about: Crumpin-Fox Club is an 18-hole golf course located in Bernardston, MA. The facility offers a traditional golf club experience with a focus on providing a comfortable and welcoming environment for players. Amenities include Zeke's Grill, a popular on-site restaurant serving classic pub food, and outdoor dining areas. The club provides various programs including instruction, membership options, and facilities for events and outings.
why_golfers_like_it: On-site dining at Zeke's Grill offers a relaxing way to end a round
Variety of instructional programs available for all skill levels
Outdoor pavilion and After-Deck provide comfortable space for groups
Trackman technology for advanced swing analysis and lessons
Welcoming environment suitable for both golfers and non-golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Zeke's Grill serves classic pub food, with outdoor dining and pavilion for groups
Full bar service available at Zeke's Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman technology is available for lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, as a golf course it's assumed players will use their own clubs, though club rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant (Zeke's Grill) serving food and drinks, so outside food/drink policies aren't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole golf play time, typically 4-5 hours depending on pace of play and course conditions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears kid-friendly with junior golf programs available and a welcoming atmosphere for families.
